pr.title: Record: Triple Loop + Fused Kernels + Parallel Residuals + N-gram Tilt; val_bpb 1.08014 (5-seed mean)

output.summary: Adds a third loop pass for extra virtual layers, fuses MLP activation/backward kernels, leverages GPT-J parallel residuals, and tilts eval logits with a causal n-gram hint.
techniques: Triple-loop recurrence with earlier activation plus GPT-J-style parallel residuals
Triton TMA forward and CUTLASS EVT backward fusion around the MLP activation
Eval-time causal n-gram tilt that exponentially biases logits toward prefix hints
